items: Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of the 2023-2024 Certificated Seniority Report
Approval of the 2023-2024 Classified Seniority Reports
Ratification of Warrant Registers, February 1, 2024 - February 29, 2024
Approval of Agreement between the Redwood City School District and TeamCivX and Godbe Research to conduct a Parcel Tax Measure Feasibility Study
Adoption of Resolution No. 7, Reduction or Elimination of Certificated Services for Fiscal Year 2023-2024
Adoption of Resolution No. 8, Reduction of Certain Classified Services for Fiscal Year 2023-2024
Adoption of Resolution No. 9, Release and Reassignment of Certificated Administrators(s)
Approval of Release of Temporary Teachers
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - January 2024
Other Business/Suggested Items For Future Agenda
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 7.1 (Approval of Agreement for Parcel Tax Measure Feasibility Study) was moved to after item 7.5 (Approval of Release of Temporary Teachers)
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion to approve. Thank you. Seconded. Thank you. Roll call vote, please. Trustee Marquez. Aye. Trustee Weekley. Aye. Trustee McEvoy. Aye. Vice President Wells. Aye. President Lawson. Aye.
